data.title: stub-timer-action Output
data.description: Output produced by the stub-timer-action worker.

elapsedMs.title: Elapsed (ms)
elapsedMs.description: Milliseconds elapsed from timerStartedAt to the moment the task executed. Null if timerStartedAt was not provided.

firedAt.title: Fired At
firedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task began executing.
